subject: Shuppet, a small ghost-type Pokémon with a triangular body and upright horn, floating in a nighttime setting
description: A small, pale-purple ghost creature with a pointed horn on its head and simple dark eyes hovers against a nighttime backdrop. The scene features stylized dark rooftops or angular structures in the background rendered in deep purples and blues, with a large pink or lavender moon or glowing orb dominating the upper portion of the frame. The creature faces roughly forward with a flat, sheet-like body tapering to a curved tail. The overall palette is cool purples, pinks, and dark blues, evoking a haunted or dreamlike atmosphere.
foreground: Shuppet floating centrally, flat purple body with upright horn
background: Nighttime rooftops or angular dark structures, large glowing pink orb / moon
